parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Agreement year filter. Repeat query key for multiple values.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Exact target company names to include.

parameters.name: acquirer
parameters.description: Exact acquirer company names to include.

parameters.name: standard_id
parameters.description: Clause type taxonomy standard IDs (Clause Type in the Search UI). Parent IDs expand to include descendant taxonomy nodes.

parameters.name: transaction_price_total
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Accepted but currently ignored by the query engine.

parameters.name: transaction_price_stock
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Accepted but currently ignored by the query engine.

parameters.name: transaction_price_cash
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Accepted but currently ignored by the query engine.

parameters.name: transaction_price_assets
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Accepted but currently ignored by the query engine.

parameters.name: transaction_consideration
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Transaction consideration category values from the agreement record.

parameters.name: target_type
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Target company type values (for example `public` or `private`).

parameters.name: acquirer_type
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Acquirer company type values (for example `public` or `private`).

parameters.name: target_industry
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Target industry values from normalized agreement metadata.

parameters.name: acquirer_industry
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Acquirer industry values from normalized agreement metadata.

parameters.name: deal_status
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Deal status values (for example `pending`, `complete`, `cancelled`).

parameters.name: attitude
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Deal attitude values (for example `friendly`, `hostile`, `unsolicited`).

parameters.name: deal_type
parameters.description: Deal type values from agreement metadata.

parameters.name: purpose
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Strategic purpose values from agreement metadata.

parameters.name: target_pe
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Target private-equity backed filter. Supported values: `true`, `false`.

parameters.name: acquirer_pe
parameters.description: Pending: currently deactivated in the Search UI. Acquirer private-equity backed filter. Supported values: `true`, `false`.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Additional agreement metadata fields to include in each result under `results[].metadata`. Repeat query key for multiple values.

parameters.name: agreement_uuid
parameters.description: Filter to one agreement UUID.

parameters.name: section_uuid
parameters.description: Filter to one section UUID.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort key. One of: `year`, `target`, `acquirer`.

parameters.name: sort_direction
parameters.description: Sort direction. One of: `asc`, `desc`.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-based page number.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Page size. Effective max is 10 for unauthenticated callers and 100 for authenticated callers.
